headline.purpose: Page titles, onboarding titles, splash, status screens, and high-emphasis empty states.

title.purpose: Section labels, card headings, menu titles, member names, and repeated module headers.

body.purpose: Primary reading text, feed content, form helper copy, banners, and legal guidance.

label.purpose: Buttons, navigation labels, chips, and compact actions.

shadows.name: none-at-rest
shadows.purpose: Cards, app bars, inputs, navigation, and chips are flat at rest.

motion.name: material-state
motion.value: Material ink and platform state transitions
motion.purpose: State feedback for taps, focus, selection, and modal sheets.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary Persimmon action button for submitting, continuing, saving, and retrying.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #B45637; color: #FFFAF4; border: 0; border-radius: 18px; padding: 16px 18px; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; min-height: 48px; transition: background 180ms ease-out, transform 180ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #A44635; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #F3D8CA; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Outlined Button
components.description: Secondary button for alternate actions, back actions, and lower-emphasis choices.
components.css: .ds-btn-outlined { background: transparent; color: #261B14; border: 1px solid #D3C1AF; border-radius: 18px; padding: 16px 18px; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; min-height: 48px; transition: background 180ms ease-out, border-color 180ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-outlined:hover { background: #EFE5D8; } .ds-btn-outlined:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #F3D8CA; outline-offset: 2px; border-color: #B45637; }

components.name: Surface Card
components.description: Flat Porcelain Panel container with large corners and a 1px Clay Border.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFCF7; color: #261B14; border: 1px solid #D3C1AF; border-radius: 24px; padding: 18px; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow: none; } .ds-card h3 { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; } .ds-card p { margin: 0; color: #66594C; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.45; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Filled warm field with soft helper text and Primary Persimmon focus border.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 6px; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #66594C; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-field input { background: #FFFCF7; color: #261B14; border: 1px solid #D3C1AF; border-radius: 20px; padding: 16px 18px; font: inherit; font-size: 15px; outline: none; } .ds-field input:focus { border-color: #B45637; border-width: 1.5px; }

components.name: Chip
components.description: Pill-shaped status, filter, or category marker using muted surface color.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 32px; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid #D3C1AF; background: #EFE5D8; color: #261B14; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-chip[aria-selected="true"] { background: #F3D8CA; border-color: #B45637; }

components.name: Bottom Navigation
components.description: Warm app navigation with restrained selected-state treatment and strong label weights.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 6px; background: rgba(255,252,247,0.96); border-top: 1px solid #D3C1AF; padding: 8px 10px; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-item { flex: 1; text-align: center; color: #66594C; border-radius: 999px; padding: 8px 6px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-item.ds-selected { background: #F3D8CA; color: #261B14; font-weight: 700; }

components.name: Semantic Banner
components.description: Full-width attention strip for profile completion, verification, and other recoverable states.
components.html:
!

Profil bilgilerini tamamla. Dönem ve iletişim önerilerin doğruluğunu artırır.
components.css: .ds-banner { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; background: #F2E3C4; color: #261B14; padding: 10px 16px; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; } .ds-banner-icon { display: grid; place-items: center; width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 999px; color: #8A5D16; font-weight: 800; } .ds-banner p { flex: 1; margin: 0; } .ds-banner button { border: 0; background: transparent; color: #B45637; font-weight: 700; font-family: inherit; }

narrative.overview:
SDAL Sosyal is a private community product, not a public social network. The interface should feel like a warm, trusted meeting place for the SDAL community: familiar enough to move quickly, specific enough that it never reads as a generic school portal. The current Flutter app expresses this through warm cream surfaces, a controlled persimmon accent, Manrope typography, clear semantic states, and flat Material 3 components.

The system is product-first. It privileges task clarity, quick scanning, Turkish-first copy, and predictable mobile patterns. Liveliness comes from fresh content, status badges, warm tonal surfaces, mineral secondary colors, and small moments like logo marks or state strips; it must not come from performative social-media chrome.
keyCharacteristics: Warm cream canvas with persimmon accent used for primary actions and selection.
Flat-by-default surfaces with border and tonal layering instead of heavy shadow.
Manrope-only typography with strong weight contrast for headings and labels.
Large, friendly radii that still feel controlled and task-oriented.
Semantic color vocabulary for success, warning, info, danger, admin, chat, and media states.

rules.name: The Persimmon Is Rare Rule
rules.body: Primary Persimmon must mark action, selection, or state. Do not use it as decorative filler.

rules.name: The Semantic Pair Rule
rules.body: Success, warning, info, and danger must travel as foreground plus muted background pairs. Never rely on hue alone.

rules.name: The Warm Plus Mineral Rule
rules.body: New neutral surfaces must stay in the warm cream, oat, linen, clay family, while secondary states may use the mineral blue-green lane. Do not introduce pure white, pure black, cold gray, or generic blue-gray app chrome.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Use Manrope everywhere. Do not introduce display fonts, script fonts, mono-forward UI, or decorative type in product surfaces.

rules.name: The Weight Before Ornament Rule
rules.body: Create hierarchy with weight, size, spacing, and placement. Do not use gradient text, novelty casing, or decorative letter spacing.

rules.name: The Tonal Depth Rule
rules.body: Reach first for panel, panelRaised, panelMuted, and panelBorder. Shadows are not the default depth language.

rules.name: The No Floating Stack Rule
rules.body: Do not stack cards inside cards to create hierarchy. Use sections, list tiles, dividers, surface tone, or spacing.

dos: Do use canvas-warm-cream, panel-porcelain, and panel-muted-linen as the default surface vocabulary.
Do reserve primary-persimmon for primary actions, current selection, progress, and high-value state.
Do pair status colors with icons, labels, or structure so color is never the only signal.
Do keep buttons, fields, chips, and cards visually consistent across modules.
Do use standard Flutter and Material affordances for fields, lists, bottom sheets, tabs, navigation, loading, and retry states.
Do keep Turkish-first copy concise, concrete, and calm.
Do use skeletons, empty states, and friendly errors instead of raw exceptions or blank screens.
donts: Don't make the app feel like a generic school portal.
Don't make it a corporate LinkedIn clone.
Don't make it a childish social app.
Don't make it a heavy admin panel.
Don't make it a Facebook-like feed.
Don't make it an Instagram-like media app.
Don't use gradient text, decorative glassmorphism, side-stripe card borders, or hero-metric templates.
Don't introduce pure black, pure white, cold gray, neon accents, or default blue Material theming.
Don't use heavy shadows to imply depth. Use tone and borders.
Don't turn every screen into identical icon-heading-text card grids.
